title: Shower Curtain Pole Extendable Curtain Poles 78-195 Cm Tension Rods For Curtains Extendable No Drill Shower Curtain Rail Non-Slip White Shower Pole for Bathroom Kitchen Bedroom
features: 【Effortless No-Drill Curtain Pole】 Experience the convenience of our no-drill curtain pole, a complete set inclusive of two extendable curtain poles and two telescopic poles, designed to offer a hassle-free installation that leaves your walls intact.

【Extendable Curtain Poles for Every Space】 Discover the ultimate in versatility with our extendable curtain poles, adjustable from 78cm to an impressive 195 cm to fit a wide array of spaces, from showers in compact bathrooms to larger areas in kitchens and bedrooms.

【No-Drill, Shower Poles Extendable for Easy Installation】 Say goodbye to drills and wall damage with our shower poles extendable no drill design. Complete with a comprehensive instruction manual, this shower curtain pole promises a hassle-free installation, perfect for DIY enthusiasts or anyone preferring a clean, simple setup.

【Secure Non-Slip Shower Curtain Pole】 Our robust 5cm non-slip heads ensure your shower curtain rail stays firmly in place without budging, providing dependable stability even in steamy bathroom conditions.

【High-Quality, Rust-Resistant Shower Curtain Rail】 Crafted with premium, rust-resistant materials, our shower curtain rail is designed to withstand the test of time, maintaining its sleek appearance and functionality throughout continuous use.
